message:
fix(viewer): clean up time-travel styles, controls, and animation frames on graph rebuild/cleanup

- Track injected time-travel <style> element in timeTravelState.styleEl
  and remove it alongside controlsEl during cleanup() and when rebuilding
  timeline controls, preventing leaked DOM elements across graph reinits
- Cancel time-travel animation frame and reset playing state in cleanup()
- Call hideLabelLegend() during cleanup to remove orphaned legend overlays
- Add graph_runtime_cleans_up_time_travel_styles_and_controls test
  asserting styleEl tracking, style removal, and controls removal
- Sync beads issue tracker and history snapshots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
